items.name: Pretend to be Asleep
items.description:
This Emote serves 2 things
The first was used to be asleep or dead to make more practical jokes on your friends or to be the most pay to win that exists in history.
The second was to hide an ingenious way so that this guy doesn't catch you, you are fake dead when the murderer was looking for you to win the game.


TAGS
Pretend to be Dead
Fingir estar dormido,
Faire semblant de dormir,
So tun, als ob man schläft,
Fingere di dormire,
Fingir estar a dormindo,
Притворяться спящим,
假装睡觉,
假裝睡覺,
眠っているふりをする,
잠자는 척하다,
التظاهر بالنوم,
להעמיד פנים שאני ישן,
แกล้งนอนหลับ,
Udawać, że śpisz,
Giả vờ ngủ,
Uyuyormuş gibi yapmak,
Berpura-pura tidur,
Předstírat, že spíš,
Tettetni, hogy alszol,
A pretinde că dormi,
Pretvarati se da spavaš,
Прикидатися сплячим,
